revision.comment: Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1212038719|1212038719]] by [[Special:Contributions/Justlettersandnumbers|Justlettersandnumbers]] ([[User talk:Justlettersandnumbers|talk]]) – if disambiguation was "necessary", we would have moved [[Jupiter]] back to [[Jupiter (planet)]] by now. Disambiguation has not been necessary [[special:permalink/12519087|since 2005]].
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from unnecessary disambiguation |name=From currently unnecessary disambiguation |from=a page name that has a currently unneeded disambiguation [[WP:QUALIFIER|qualifier]] |info=Examples are: *:* Jupiter (planet)[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px|alt=redirects to|link=]]Jupiter <small>(unnecessary parenthetical qualifier)</small> *:* Paris, France[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px|alt=redirects to|link=]]Paris <small>(unnecessary comma-separated qualifier)</small> *:* Japanese Bobtail cat[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px|alt=redirects to|link=]]Japanese Bobtail <small>(unnecessary natural qualifier)</small> ** {{cat|Redirects to disambiguation pages}} is a [[WP:subcategory|subcategory]] of this rcat's category. So this rcat should {{large|''not''}} be used on mainspace disambiguation redirects with "(disambiguation)" in the page title. Use {{tl|R to disambiguation page}} ''instead''. |all category=Redirects from unnecessary disambiguation |printworthy={{#if:{{{printworthy|}}}|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from unnecessary disambiguation |name=From currently unnecessary disambiguation |from=a page name that has a currently unneeded disambiguation [[WP:QUALIFIER|qualifier]] |info=Examples are: *:* Jupiter (planet)[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px|alt=redirects to|link=]]Jupiter <small>(unnecessary parenthetical qualifier)</small> *:* Paris, France[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px|alt=redirects to|link=]]Paris <small>(unnecessary comma-separated qualifier)</small> *:* Japanese Bobtail cat[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px|alt=redirects to|link=]]Japanese Bobtail <small>(unnecessary natural qualifier)</small> ** {{cat|Redirects to disambiguation pages}} is a [[WP:subcategory|subcategory]] of this rcat's category. So this rcat should {{large|''not''}} be used on mainspace disambiguation redirects with "(disambiguation)" in the page title. Use {{tl|R to disambiguation page}} ''instead''. |all category=Redirects from unnecessary disambiguation |printworthy={{#if:{{{printworthy|}}}|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from unnecessary disambiguation |name=From currently unnecessary disambiguation |from=a page name that has a currently unneeded disambiguation [[WP:QUALIFIER|qualifier]] |info=Examples are: *:* Jupiter (planet)[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px|alt=redirects to|link=]]Jupiter <small>(unnecessary parenthetical qualifier)</small> *:* Paris, France[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px|alt=redirects to|link=]]Paris <small>(unnecessary comma-separated qualifier)</small> *:* Japanese Bobtail cat[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px|alt=redirects to|link=]]Japanese Bobtail <small>(unnecessary natural qualifier)</small> ** {{cat|Redirects to disambiguation pages}} is a [[WP:subcategory|subcategory]] of this rcat's category. So this rcat should {{large|''not''}} be used on mainspace disambiguation redirects with "(disambiguation)" in the page title. Use {{tl|R to disambiguation page}} ''instead''. |all category=Redirects from unnecessary disambiguation |printworthy={{#if:{{{printworthy|}}}|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from unnecessary disambiguation |name=From currently unnecessary disambiguation |from=a page name that has a currently unneeded disambiguation [[WP:QUALIFIER|qualifier]] |info=Examples are: *:* Jupiter (planet)[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px|alt=redirects to|link=]]Jupiter <small>(unnecessary parenthetical qualifier)</small> *:* Paris, France[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px|alt=redirects to|link=]]Paris <small>(unnecessary comma-separated qualifier)</small> *:* Japanese Bobtail cat[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px|alt=redirects to|link=]]Japanese Bobtail <small>(unnecessary natural qualifier)</small> ** {{cat|Redirects to disambiguation pages}} is a [[WP:subcategory|subcategory]] of this rcat's category. So this rcat should {{large|''not''}} be used on mainspace disambiguation redirects with "(disambiguation)" in the page title. Use {{tl|R to disambiguation page}} ''instead''. |all category=Redirects from unnecessary disambiguation |printworthy={{#if:{{{printworthy|}}}|yes|no}} }}<noinclude>
